summary: Iteration 3 (Branding white-label + persistencia + seed_admin migracion + sale-vs-deactivated defense) tested end-to-end. Backend pytest: 16/16 PASSED in test_iteration_3_branding.py (branding GET public, PUT admin merge, PUT 401 sin token, PUT 403 afiliado, RESET 401/403, RESET admin defaults, large logo ~480KB b64, sale a afiliado desactivado -> 400, regresiones root/status/login admin/login juan/stats me/network 403 afiliado/network admin, PERSISTENCIA tras supervisorctl restart backend con marker product_name unico). Adicionalmente regresion iter-2: 25/25 PASSED. Frontend Playwright: 14/14 checks PASSED (4ta tab Branding visible, todos los campos del form + 4 color pickers + file upload + preview, live-preview actualiza al tipear sin guardar, GUARDAR muestra 'Branding actualizado...', document.title cambia al nuevo product_name, CSS variable --brand-primary aplicada en :root, login refleja product_name nuevo + linea 'Soporte:', RESTABLECER pide confirm y restaura defaults). Total: 41 backend + 14 UI = 55 checks, 100% green.
critical_code_review_comments: branding.py PUT max logo size is 2_000_000 chars (~1.5MB raw); UI cap is 600KB. Backend cap is consistent and safe but documenting both limits side by side would help.

branding.py does not validate hex color format on primary_color/accent_color/background_color/text_color (Pydantic only checks max_length). Garbage like 'not-a-color' would persist and break preview. Recommend regex ^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$ validator.

auth.py.seed_admin migration path 2 is correct logic but skips silently when target email collides with an affiliate (returns without log). Add logger.warning so operators see why migration didn't happen.

AdminDashboard.js grew to ~423 lines with the new BrandingTab import. Inline sub-components (Overview, AffiliatesTab, SalesTab) should still be split per file for maintainability before the next feature lands.
BrandingContext applies document.title on every refresh; if multiple BrandingProvider instances ever mount (e.g. test harness) they would race. Acceptable for current single-provider setup.
The PUT /api/branding endpoint has no rate limit; an admin token leak would allow flooding the singleton doc. Low risk given JWT-only and 8h expiry, but a per-token limit would harden.
Carry-over from iter-2 still valid: JWT_SECRET committed in .env, models.py uses EmailStr=str alias, /api/stats/network N+1 query, AdminDashboard >400 lines.
test_credentials: admin@admin.com / Admin#2026 ; juan@test.com / juan123 (afiliado seed). Ambas validas. Token JWT 8h.
seed_data_creation: El test de persistencia cambia branding.product_name a un marker temporal y luego ejecuta POST /api/branding/reset al final, dejando branding en defaults. test_create_sale_for_deactivated_returns_400 desactiva y reactiva juan en finally. No queda data colgada.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration_3_branding.py es ahora la suite vigente para branding + sale-defense + persistencia. Convive con test_iteration_2_affiliates.py (25 cases) y test_bot_multiplataforma.py (iter1). Para correr todo: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. NOTA IMPORTANTE: el test TestPersistenceAfterRestart::test_persistence_after_backend_restart hace `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` y espera ~22s. Si el backend tarda mas en levantar, el ciclo de retries (20*1s) lo cubre. NO TESTEADO en esta iter (decision conservadora): la migracion automatica de admin al cambiar ADMIN_EMAIL en .env (auth.py.seed_admin path 2). El codigo se reviso y luce correcto pero no se ejercito en runtime por evitar dejar el .env en estado intermedio si el test falla. Recomendado para iter 4: test que cambie temporalmente ADMIN_EMAIL via os.environ patch + llamar seed_admin(db) directo en pytest sin tocar el .env real.
rca of the issue: N/A — todas las acceptance criteria del review pasan. Branding context aplica CSS variables y document.title correctamente, preview en vivo no requiere PUT, persistencia MongoDB confirmada via restart real. defensa de venta a afiliado desactivado funciona (HTTP 400). Solo se omitio el live-test del path migratorio de admin por riesgo a entorno; el codigo es correcto por inspeccion.
